hero.title: The Diamond Guide
hero.subtitle: An elegant introduction to the qualities that make each diamond unique.

fourCs.title: The 4Cs of Diamond Quality
fourCs.subtitle: Understanding these four characteristics will help you choose the perfect diamond.

items.title: Cut
items.description: The quality of a diamond's cut determines its brilliance and sparkle. A well-cut diamond reflects light beautifully.

items.title: Color
items.description: Diamond color is graded from D (colorless) to Z (light yellow). The less color, the rarer and more valuable the diamond.

items.title: Clarity
items.description: Clarity measures the absence of inclusions and blemishes. Flawless diamonds are exceptionally rare and highly prized.

items.title: Carat
items.description: Carat refers to the diamond's weight, not its size. Larger carats are rarer, making weight a major factor in a diamond's value.

shapes.title: Explore Diamond Shapes
shapes.subtitle: Each shape offers a distinct style and personality. Discover the one that speaks to you.

anatomy.title: Anatomy of a Diamond
anatomy.subtitle: Learn the key parts of a diamond that contribute to its overall beauty and structure.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Perfect Diamond?
cta.subtitle: Explore our curated collection of diamond engagement rings and fine jewelry.
